string.text: Commander, we haven't been in touch for a while. From now on, focus on my true strength, and not on talks about being the strongest second-generation Tactical Doll.
It's alright, Voymastina. Glad to see you here!
You're on time today too, huh? I've already sent you the schedule. If you have no objections, then let's begin immediately.
Voymastina, what's your opinion about Alva?
Without a doubt, Alva is a competent captain. So even if I sometimes don't understand her intentions, I will carry them out without hesitation.
Please don't stray too far from me. Within my range of fire is the safest place.
Okay Voymastina, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
Before you depart, please allow me to check your protective gear one last time.
